title: Merge Triplets to Form Target Triplet
titleCn: 合并若干三元组以形成目标三元组

testcases.input: triplets = [[2,5,3],[1,8,4],[1,7,5]], target = [2,7,5] Output: true Explanation: Perform the following operations: - Choose the first and last triplets [[2,5,3],[1,8,4],[1,7,5]]. Update the last triplet to be [max(2,1), max(5,7), max(3,5)] = [2,7,5]. triplets = [[2,5,3],[1,8,4],[2,7,5]] The target triplet [2,7,5] is now an element of triplets.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Perform the following operations: - Choose the first and last triplets [[2,5,3],[1,8,4],[1,7,5]]. Update the last triplet to be [max(2,1), max(5,7), max(3,5)] = [2,7,5]. triplets = [[2,5,3],[1,8,4],[2,7,5]] The target triplet [2,7,5] is now an element of triplets.

testcases.input: triplets = [[3,4,5],[4,5,6]], target = [3,2,5] Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to have [3,2,5] as an element because there is no 2 in any of the triplets.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to have [3,2,5] as an element because there is no 2 in any of the triplets.

testcases.input: triplets = [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[1,2,5],[5,2,3]], target = [5,5,5] Output: true Explanation: Perform the following operations: - Choose the first and third triplets [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[1,2,5],[5,2,3]]. Update the third triplet to be [max(2,1), max(5,2), max(3,5)] = [2,5,5]. triplets = [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[2,5,5],[5,2,3]]. - Choose the third and fourth triplets [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[2,5,5],[5,2,3]]. Update the fourth triplet to be [max(2,5), max(5,2), max(5,3)] = [5,5,5]. triplets = [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[2,5,5],[5,5,5]]. The target triplet [5,5,5] is now an element of triplets.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Perform the following operations: - Choose the first and third triplets [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[1,2,5],[5,2,3]]. Update the third triplet to be [max(2,1), max(5,2), max(3,5)] = [2,5,5]. triplets = [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[2,5,5],[5,2,3]]. - Choose the third and fourth triplets [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[2,5,5],[5,2,3]]. Update the fourth triplet to be [max(2,5), max(5,2), max(5,3)] = [5,5,5]. triplets = [[2,5,3],[2,3,4],[2,5,5],[5,5,5]]. The target triplet [5,5,5] is now an element of triplets.
